title: lathyrus nevadensis subsp. stipulaceus
intro: Lathyrus nevadensis subsp. stipulaceus, commonly known as the Stipulate Nevada Pea, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the pea family (Fabaceae), native to the southwestern United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lathyrus nevadensis subsp. stipulaceus include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and support respiratory health. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
